Terms of Use

Effective Date: 21/08/2025

Text to Speech, developed and operated by Yauheni Chyruk (“we,” “our,” or “us”), provides this mobile application (the “App”) subject to the following Terms of Use (“Terms”). By downloading or using the App, you agree to these Terms. Please read them carefully.

1. Use of the App

  • The App is provided for personal, non-commercial use only.
  • You agree not to misuse the App, attempt unauthorized access, or interfere with its normal operation.

2. Subscriptions & Payments

  • The App offers optional paid subscriptions to access premium features.
  • Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at the time of confirmation of purchase.
  • Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period.
  • Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours before the end of the current period, at the price displayed in the App Store at the time of renewal.
  • Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal turned off by going to your Apple ID account settings.
  • Refunds are handled directly by Apple in accordance with their policies.

3. Content & Data

  • You are responsible for the accuracy of any data you enter into the App (e.g., food items, weights).
  • The App provides nutritional estimates for informational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice.

4. Intellectual Property

  • All content, design, and functionality of the App are owned by us and protected by copyright and intellectual property laws.
  • You may not copy, distribute, or modify any part of the App without our written permission.

5. Not a Medical Service Disclaimer

  • The App is not a medical application and does not provide medical advice, diagnoses, or treatment plans.
  • All nutritional information and recommendations generated by the App are estimates intended for informational and self-educational purposes only.
  • You should always consult with a physician, nutritionist, or qualified healthcare professional before making dietary, fitness, or health-related decisions.
  • By using the App, you acknowledge that use is at your own risk, and we are not liable for any health issues, injuries, or consequences arising from reliance on the App’s content.

6. Limitation of Liability

  • The App is provided “as is” and “as available” without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
  • We disclaim all implied warranties, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
  • To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not responsible for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use of or inability to use the App.

7. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time, without notice, if you violate these Terms or engage in misuse of the App.

8. Changes to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. Updates will be posted in the App and/or on our website with a revised Effective Date. Continued use of the App after such updates constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

9. Contact

If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at: aidente.contactus@gmail.com
